channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in All Languages (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in All Languages nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 ultraworkers/claw-code (127993 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ultraworkers

📝 Repository: ultraworkers/claw-code

📄 Descrizione: The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Better Harness Tools that make real things done. Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

⭐ Stelle: 127993

🍴 Forks: 101925

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T08:58:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-02T04:22:56Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 instructkr/claw-code (77865 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: instructkr

📝 Repository: instructkr/claw-code

📄 Descrizione: The fastest repo in history to surpass 50K stars ⭐, reaching the milestone in just 2 hours after publication. Better Harness Tools, not merely storing the archive of leaked Claude Code but make real things done. Now rewriting in Rust using oh-my-codex.

⭐ Stelle: 77865

🍴 Forks: 77103

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T08:58:08Z

]]>

📄 Descrizione: ARIS ⚔️ (Auto-Research-In-Sleep) — Lightweight Markdown-only skills for autonomous ML research: cross-model review loops, idea discovery, and experiment automation. No framework, no lock-in — works with Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, or any LLM agent.

⭐ Stelle: 5185

🍴 Forks: 430

💻 Linguaggio: Python
